name: Central Finland (Finland)

colors.symbolism: the argent field of the regional arms
the sable charge of the arms

description: A square white flag charged centrally with the black provincial arms of Central Finland.
history: Central Finland (Keski-Suomi) became a region under Finland's 1997 administrative reform; its banner is the heraldic flag of the regional coat of arms.

features.symbolism: a stylised black device on a silver field, derived from the historic provincial arms; the design refers to the inland-lake region of central Finland and its medieval borderland identity.
